summary: Mission v9.5.0 - Frontend Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) Video link field in Dashboard with label '🎬 Lien de votre vidéo (YouTube ou MP4 direct)', instructions, and URL validation badge. (2) Solde display 'Mon Solde: X Crédits' with 'Acheter des crédits' button when solde=0. (3) Anti-régression: Flux Reels minimaliste + Retour au Flux button functional.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ CoachDashboard.js L4581-4636: Video field with label '🎬 Lien de votre vidéo (YouTube ou MP4 direct)'
✅ CoachDashboard.js L4586-4587: Instructions 'Cette vidéo s'affichera dans le flux vertical pour tous les membres'
✅ CoachDashboard.js L4622-4629: Badge validation (✓ YouTube, ✓ Vimeo, ✓ Vidéo, ✓ Image)
✅ CoachDashboard.js L3959-3990: Solde display 'Mon Solde : X Crédits'
✅ CoachDashboard.js L3974-3987: Button 'Acheter des crédits' visible when coachCredits <= 0
✅ PartnersCarousel.js: NO counter, NO indicators - Ultra-minimaliste interface
✅ PartnersCarousel.js: Photo + Like collé + Nom + Bio (2 lines max)
✅ CoachVitrine.js L598-609: 'Retour au Flux' button with --primary-color
✅ CoachVitrine.js L269-282: cameFromFlux state via sessionStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v9.5.0 verified. Dashboard features (video field, solde) verified via CODE REVIEW since Google auth required. Key code locations: (1) Video field: CoachDashboard.js L4581-4636 with label '🎬 Lien de votre vidéo', instructions, and URL validation badge. (2) Solde: L3959-3990 showing 'Mon Solde : X Crédits' with 'Acheter des crédits' button when solde=0. (3) Reels flux minimaliste working - no counter, no indicators. (4) Navigation to vitrine works via click on profile overlay. (5) 'Retour au Flux' button uses --primary-color #D91CD2. (6) All 7 Bassi reservations with March dates intact.

notes: Dashboard features (video field + solde) require Google authentication. Verified via CODE REVIEW that implementation matches requirements.
